topic: How Omanisation non-compliance quietly builds when you manage 10 client companies from a spreadsheet
format: Client trust story: the Sanad office that started giving every client a portal to track their own cases — what happened to client retention and referrals in the first three months
post:
One Sanad office gave every client a portal to track their own cases.

No more "what's the status?" calls. No more WhatsApp messages at 9pm.

Three months later: zero client cancellations. Four referrals from existing clients. Two new contracts signed because a prospect saw the portal during a sales meeting.

That's what happens when clients stop feeling anxious.

Here's the operational problem most Sanad offices don't catch until it's too late.

You're managing 10 client companies. Each has work permits, visa renewals, Omanisation certificates, MOL filings. You're holding all of it together with Excel tabs and a WhatsApp group that's 600 messages deep.

The Omanisation ratios drift quietly. A permit lapses. A renewal slips. Nobody caught it because nothing in your setup was built to catch it.

By the time an MOL inspection shows up, you're scrambling — and so is your client.

Sanad office management doesn't collapse all at once. It bleeds out in the gaps between files.

SmartPRO Hub was built for this exact situation: compliance dashboards per client, expiry alerts, task assignment by PRO officer, and a client portal so companies can check their own cases without picking up the phone.

Work permit tracking across Oman, structured — not a shared spreadsheet held together by hope.

Try the Sanad AI Assistant free — instant answers on work permits, visas & government fees: www.thesmartpro.io/sanad/assistant
